system.effect: The psyker grants himself or an ally preternatural awareness of incoming danger. The target gains Unnatural Agility (x2) for the purposes of Dodge tests for the duration of the power.

description.value: The psyker projects a protective web of precognitive awareness around a target, allowing them to sense and avoid incoming attacks with superhuman reflexes. The target gains Unnatural Agility (x2) for the purposes of Dodge tests while the power is sustained.
